## Validation

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`*.spec.ts` next to the code under test)
- [ ] `npm test -- --watch=false` and `npm run test:server` pass locally
- [ ] `npm run build:production` succeeds
- [ ] `docs/CHANGELOG.md` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Code follows the existing style (Prettier, two spaces, single quotes)
